prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次为8069→9666→26277→11948→16578，波动剧烈。2023年因省控线大幅下降及专业组调整出现异常暴跌至26277，2024年 迅速回弹至11948，2025年稳定在16578。近两年位次趋于平稳，2025年基准约16578名；本省物理类计划2021年43人、2022年40人、2023年39人、2024年40人、2 025年40人；2026年计划39人，较2025年小幅缩招1人（-2.5%），竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第46→2022年第50→ 2023年第47→2024年第58→2025年第56→2026年第53，近年排名稳中有升，学校综合实力持续增强；2026年声誉评价偏正面（81岁博士在华师毕业获广泛关注，展 现终身学习精神）；抖音热度排名第89位，评价为\"一般\"，短视频曝光量中等；历史投档异常记录中未见华中师范大学相关断档信号，报考心理稳定；教育学 A+（全国顶尖）、中国史A-、心理学A-、政治学A-、马克思主义理论A-，共5个A-及以上学科，师范类学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计 算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业高度契合；师范/教育类热度分化观望。本省2026年物理类考生167419人，较2025年 173347人减少5928人（-3.4%），竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年 基准位次16578、2026年计划小幅缩招（-2.5%）使竞争略加剧、但本省物理类考生减少（-3.4%）使竞争缓解、学校排名上升及声誉正面等因素，供需弹性主值16329基础上小幅下 调；预测最低位次约16279名，区间15779–16779名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间15779–16779内，建议以二档专业为主力（化学类、法学类、经济学类、教育学类），一档专业（计算机类、数学类、统计学、电子信息类）作为冲刺，三档专业 （新闻传播学类、社会学类等）作为保底。位次优于区间下限（<15779）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>16779）应以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 8069 → 9666 → 26277 → 11948 → 16578, with significant fluctuations. In 2023, due to a sharp drop in the provincial control line and adjustments in major groups, there was an abnormal plunge to 26277, which quickly rebounded to 11948 in 2024 and stabilized at 16578 in 2025. In recent two years, rankings have become stable, with a baseline of approximately 16578 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 43 in 2021, 40 in 2022, 39 in 2023, 40 in 2024, and 40 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 39, a slight reduction of 1 (-2.5%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 46th in 2021 → 50th in 2022 → 47th in 2023 → 58th in 2024 → 56th in 2025 → 53rd in 2026, showing a steady upward trend in recent years, with continuously strengthening comprehensive strength. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is generally positive (an 81-year-old doctoral graduate from CCNU received widespread attention, demonstrating lifelong learning spirit). On Douyin, it ranks 89th in popularity, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure. No signs of enrollment gaps related to Central China Normal University were found in historical abnormal admission records, indicating stable application psychology. It has A+ in Education (top nationally), A- in Chinese History, A- in Psychology, A- in Political Science, and A- in Marxist Theory, totaling 5 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding strength in normal (teacher education) disciplines, strongly attracting applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended, closely matching the Physics Category enrollment majors of this university. Normal/Education majors show divided popularity and are being observed. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in this province is 167,419, a decrease of 5,928 (-3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 16578, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-2.5%) slightly intensifies competition, but the decrease in provincial Physics Category examinees (-3.4%) eases competition, along with the university's rising ranking and positive reputation, the main supply-demand elasticity value of 16329 is slightly adjusted downward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16279, with a range of 15779 to 16779.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 15779–16779, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Chemistry, Law, Economics, Education) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Mathematics, Statistics, Electronic Information) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Journalism and Communication, Sociology, etc.) as safety options. Rankings better than the lower limit of the range (<15779) can focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors; rankings near the upper limit of the range (>16779) should primarily rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were 1221 → 1349 → 2032 → 2751 → 1561, showing an overall trend of fluctuating upward then declining. In 2024, the Liberal Arts ranking moved back to 2751 (highest in recent years), while in 2025, the new Gaokao History Category rebounded to 1561, a significant advance of 1190 places compared to 2024. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1561. Provincial History Category enrollment plans: 27 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 29 in 2024, 22 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 26, an increase of 4 (+18.18%) over 2025, a notable expansion that eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 53rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with rankings continuously rising in recent years, indicating steadily strengthening comprehensive strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is generally positive (an 81-year-old PhD graduating from CCNU received widespread attention). Douyin popularity ranking is 89th, with a rating of 'average' and moderate exposure. No historical abnormal admission records, stable application psychology. Education A+ (top nationally), Chinese History A-, Psychology A-, Political Science A-, Marxist Theory A-, totaling 5 A- and above disciplines. Strong teacher-training disciplines, highly attractive to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other liberal arts majors are socially recommended; teacher-training/education majors are in a wait-and-see phase; journalism and communication majors are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the province has 63,113 History Category candidates, a sharp decrease of 21,766 (-25.6%) from 84,879 in 2025, significantly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1561, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+18.18%), the sharp decline in provincial History Category candidates (-25.6%), the rising school ranking and positive reputation, the supply-demand elasticity main value of 1731 is slightly adjusted downward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1681, with a range of 1378–1984.
